description: The parent remediation_wave result: every brief's terminal result plus the wave-report SKELETON (wave-report.schema.json shape with the metrics this run cannot compute emitted as null and the ledger-derived queues empty — the ledger-keeper completes it; see the example README).

briefs.description: Every SUCCESSFULLY completed brief (brief_output.json shape) — a child that reached its own terminal disposition, whatever that disposition was.

failed_briefs.description: ADDITIVE (Change 2, 2026-07-07): briefs whose child run failed at the engine/child boundary (a genuine infrastructure fault, e.g. a transient provider error) rather than reaching a terminal disposition. Absent on results recorded before this field existed; treat a missing key the same as an empty array.

skipped_briefs.description: ADDITIVE (Change 2, 2026-07-07): briefs the wave never ran because an earlier stratum had a failed brief (serial-stratum execution — a later stratum may depend on the landed outcome of the one that failed). Absent on results recorded before this field existed; treat a missing key the same as an empty array.

report.description: wave-report.schema.json skeleton; scalar metrics are number-or-null here until the ledger-keeper fills them.
